name: Chocolate Drop Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, beat the butter and sugar together until well combined.
4. Add the egg and vanilla extract; beat until light and fluffy.
5. Stir together the flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
6. Alternately add the dry ingredients and buttermilk (or sour milk) to the butter mixture, mixing until just combined.
7. Using an ice cream scoop or 1/4 cup measuring cup, drop the dough about 2 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 13 to 15 minutes, or until the cookies spring back when lightly touched in the center.
9. While the cookies are on the baking sheet, sprinkle with additional sugar.
10. Allow cookies to cool slightly, then transfer them to a wire rack to cool completely. About 1 dozen cookies.
To make sour milk: Mix 1 teaspoon white vinegar with milk until equal to 1/3 cup.
